Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" LIMIT 3) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.activeEmployees"."activeEmployees" AS "activeEmployees", "_root.r.inactiveEmployees"."inactiveEmployees" AS "inactiveEmployees") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.activeEmployees"), '[]') AS "activeEmployees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.activeEmployees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."is_active" = $1::bool AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 10) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.activeEmployees.base"."role" AS "role", "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user"."user" AS "user") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.activeEmployees" FROM "_root.r.activeEmployees.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.r.activeEmployees.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user.base") AS "_root.r.activeEmployees.r.user" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.activeEmployees") AS "_root.r.activeEmployees" ON ('true') LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.inactiveEmployees"), '[]') AS "inactiveEmployees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."is_active" = $2::bool AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" LIMIT 10) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base"."role" AS "role", "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user"."user" AS "user") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees" FROM "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.base"."user_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "user" FROM "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user.base") AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees.r.user" ON ('true')) AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees") AS "_root.r.inactiveEmployees" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
